channel.title: State and architecture :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved Flutter state management exercises: setState for local state, Provider with ChangeNotifier, and Riverpod with StateProvider.

item.title: BLoC with Cubit in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise using Cubit from flutter_bloc: emit typed states, BlocBuilder, and clean separation of logic and UI.

item.title: BLoC with typed events and states in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter BLoC exercise: sealed events, typed states, remote data loading, error handling, and pattern matching in the UI.

item.title: GetX in Flutter: solved state management exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter GetX exercise: GetxController, Rx reactive variables, dependency injection with Get.put and Bindings, navigation with Get.to.

item.title: Dependency injection with get_it in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Configure dependency container with get_it for services and repositories.

item.title: DTO to domain mapper in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Implement mappers to isolate API models from business domain models.

item.title: Feature module with DI and testing in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Structure a self-contained feature with DI and basic unit tests.

item.title: Injection with Riverpod providers: solved exercise
item.description: Use Riverpod as an injection layer to swap implementations easily.

item.title: Layered architecture in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Organize a Flutter app by layers and features to scale cleanly.

item.title: Optimistic update in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Update UI instantly and rollback if backend call fails.

item.title: Repository and use cases in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Apply repository and use case patterns to decouple UI and data.

item.title: Riverpod in Flutter: solved counter exercise
item.description: Solved Riverpod Flutter exercise using StateProvider to manage counter state in a simple, scalable way.

item.title: Provider in Flutter for global state: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Provider Flutter exercise with ChangeNotifier to manage shared state cleanly across widgets.

item.title: Flutter Counter with setState: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Learn how to build a Flutter counter with setState in a solved exercise to understand local state and widget rebuilds.
